rationale: The citing article is an editorial synthesis that explicitly maps prior and special-issue studies across media sources/modalities, and the cited paper is a substantial empirical/method contribution on text-analysis of search-query language in marketing. Given this thematic overlap (multimedia/text analytics and consumer decision journey) and the likelihood it is used as an exemplar in the synthesis rather than a purely incidental mention, this is not safe to drop. With only DOI-level match evidence and no in-text snippet, a full relation judgment is still warranted.
